title: Iriba Heat Wave
lead: Iriba is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.77. This event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Iriba is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 12.2 GG. 
 The relative humidity is very low at 11%, exacerbating the heat. 
 The wind speed is moderate at 12.0 km/h, providing little relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
